title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Influenza (flu) and COVID-19 vaccines as they become available each season. Also, the program looks up vaccine records in the Oregon database to let you know what you or your child is due for. 1109 June Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 386-1115 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (541) 386-1115 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, other languages available by Language Link AREA SERVED: Hood River County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization COVID-19 Immunization Clinics Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BRIDGES TO HEALTH PATHWAYS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
